cir.text: <xml> <engine> <timeStep>5.0000000000000005e-06</timeStep> <range>10</range> <speed>1</speed> <currentSpeed>10</currentSpeed> </engine> <circuit> <wire v1="6" v2="8" x1="176" x2="176" y1="624" y2="528"/> <voltage x1="176" x2="176" y1="624" y2="528" value="9"/> <resistor x1="496" x2="496" y1="272" y2="224" resistance="1500"/> <resistor x1="496" x2="496" y1="272" y2="320" resistance="2500"/> <capacitor x1="496" x2="544" y1="272" y2="272" capacitance="1e-6"/> <capacitor x1="464" x2="496" y1="368" y2="432" capacitance="0.01e-6"/> <resistor x1="560" x2="560" y1="544" y2="624" resistance="330"/> <junction x="496" y="272"/> <junction x="272" y="528"/> <junction x="608" y="272"/> <junction x="608" y="432"/> <junction x="528" y="544"/> <junction x="544" y="432"/> </circuit> </xml>
